description_long: This is an adult woman standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a sleeveless, buttoned vest over a shirt, paired with fitted pants and ankle-high boots. Her hair is styled in a long ponytail that drapes over her right shoulder. The figure has a realistic human form with defined facial features and a natural body proportion. The clothing appears casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A casually dressed adult woman in a T-pose, wearing a vest, fitted pants, and boots, with a long ponytail.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, vest details, and ponytail draped over the right shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the ponytail, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, pants, boots, and the ponytail tied at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the ponytail's attachment at the back.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless buttoned vest over a shirt, fitted pants, ankle-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
